title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Beats Online with Crypto Payments — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Have you ever experienced the frustration of losing a sale because you couldn't accept PayPal payments, and the customer couldn't use a local bank transfer? You're not alone. Many creators in Kenya face this problem, and it's not just PayPal. Stripe and other popular payment processors often impose restrictions on certain countries, including Kenya. This can be devastating for your business, especially if you're just starting out. You've invested time and effort into creating beats, but without a reliable way to get paid, you're stuck. It's time to break free from these restrictions and explore alternative payment options. In this article, we'll show you how to sell beats online with crypto payments, no PayPal required.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling beats online with crypto payments is a game-changer for creators like you. It's a way to accept payments from customers worldwide, without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. With crypto payments, you can receive payments directly into your wallet, and send your beats to customers instantly. This means you can focus on creating, without worrying about payment restrictions. It's a level playing field, where you can compete with creators from all over the world. And with the right tools, you can make it happen, today.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind crypto payments is based on blockchain, a decentralized network that allows for secure and transparent transactions. When a customer buys a beat from you, they use a crypto wallet to send the payment to your wallet. The payment is then transferred to your bank account, or you can use it to buy other goods and services. The beauty of blockchain is that it's a trustless system, meaning you don't need to rely on intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. The transaction is recorded on the blockchain, and you can track it in real-time. This provides a high level of security and transparency, making it ideal for online transactions.

This technology is built for creators like you, who want to sell beats online without restrictions. It's ideal for music producers, DJs, and other musicians who want to reach a global audience. With crypto payments, you can accept payments from customers worldwide, without worrying about payment restrictions. It's a way to level the playing field, and compete with creators from all over the world. And with the right tools, you can make it happen, today. You don't need to be a tech expert to use crypto payments. With the right tools, you can set up a secure and reliable payment system, and start selling beats online, today.
Crypto payments provide a level playing field for creators, allowing them to compete with creators from all over the world.

The components that make crypto payments work together are blockchain, crypto wallets, and the Web3 Wallet Connect tool. The blockchain provides a secure and transparent network for transactions. The crypto wallet allows customers to send payments to your wallet. And the Web3 Wallet Connect tool provides a secure and reliable way to connect your wallet to your bank account. With these components working together, you can accept payments from customers worldwide, and send your beats to customers instantly. It's a seamless and secure process, that's easy to set up and use.

Now that you know how to sell beats online with crypto payments, it's time to take action. First, you'll need to set up a crypto wallet, such as MetaMask or Trust Wallet. Next, you'll need to connect your wallet to the Web3 Wallet Connect tool. This will allow you to accept payments from customers worldwide, and send your beats to customers instantly. Finally, you'll need to create a sales page, and promote your beats to customers. With the right tools, and a little bit of effort, you can start selling beats online, today.
